description:
Soft Neoprene Makeup Bag Designed for Modern Travel

This custom neoprene makeup bag is designed for customers who need a stylish and practical solution for organizing cosmetics, skincare products, and daily essentials. Made from premium neoprene material, the pouch features a smooth touch, lightweight construction, and excellent flexibility, making it ideal for both home storage and travel use.

The minimalist rectangular shape provides enough space for makeup brushes, lipstick, foundation, skincare bottles, and personal accessories while keeping everything neatly organized. The soft padded neoprene fabric helps protect items from scratches and minor impacts during transportation.

Durable Waterproof Neoprene Material

Constructed with high-quality neoprene fabric, this cosmetic pouch offers excellent resistance against moisture and daily wear. The water-resistant surface helps protect stored items from accidental splashes, making it suitable for bathroom use, beach trips, and outdoor activities.

The soft structure allows the bag to fit easily into handbags, backpacks, and luggage without taking up unnecessary space.
seoDescription: Guizhou O'lay manufactures custom neoprene makeup bags with waterproof fabric, soft touch, lightweight design and OEM logo customization for global beauty brands and wholesalers.
